message:
fix(core): correct dev-shell spawn_command assertion in native_mux test

The dev-shell profile intentionally has spawn_command=None (uses default
shell), but the test asserted is_some(). Fix to assert is_none() to
match the actual register_defaults() implementation. 30/30 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
